name: developer-portal
description: Backstage developer portal and code-server (VS Code in browser). Provides service catalog, developer self-service, and the primary interface for Claude Code agents. Also delivers SonarQube and ReportPortal for code quality and test result history.
sprintGoal: Ship the Backstage developer portal Helm chart and SonarQube/ReportPortal charts, with a GGE G5 ANDON fix ensuring future sprint planning never stalls.

stories.title: Helm chart: Backstage scaffold with Keycloak OIDC and ArgoCD app
stories.description: Create charts/backstage/ with all standard Helm templates: Chart.yaml, values.yaml, Deployment, Service, Ingress, PodDisruptionBudget. Configure Keycloak OIDC auth fields in values.yaml (keycloak.url, keycloak.clientId, keycloak.realm). Ingress hostname at backstage.{{ .Values.global.domain }}. replicaCount: 2 with podAntiAffinity. Create argocd-apps/devex/backstage-app.yaml ArgoCD Application manifest pointing to charts/backstage/.
acceptanceCriteria: charts/backstage/Chart.yaml exists with apiVersion: v2 and name: backstage
charts/backstage/values.yaml has keycloak.url and keycloak.clientId fields
helm template charts/backstage/ | grep hostname confirms ingress uses global.domain variable
stories.testPlan: helm lint charts/backstage/; helm template charts/backstage/ | grep 'kind: PodDisruptionBudget'; helm template charts/backstage/ | grep podAntiAffinity; grep replicaCount charts/backstage/values.yaml; grep keycloak charts/backstage/values.yaml; kubectl apply --dry-run=client -f argocd-apps/devex/backstage-app.yaml

smart.notes: Achievable 4: creating 8+ Helm template files plus an ArgoCD Application manifest is at the top of the 3-point budget, but every file is well-defined so scope is fixed.

stories.title: Backstage plugin config: GitLab catalog, Kubernetes, ArgoCD, TechDocs
stories.description: Extend charts/backstage/values.yaml (created in 027a) with plugin configuration sections: (1) backstage.appConfig.catalog.providers.gitlab with host field for catalog-info.yaml auto-discovery; (2) backstage.appConfig.kubernetes.clusterLocatorMethods for Kubernetes plugin; (3) backstage.appConfig.argocd.appLocatorMethods for ArgoCD plugin; (4) backstage.appConfig.techdocs.builder and techdocs.publisher with type: awsS3 pointing to ceph-bucket. All values are config-only — no new templates required. helm lint must still pass after additions.
acceptanceCriteria: grep -A3 'catalog:' charts/backstage/values.yaml shows providers.gitlab section with host field
grep -A3 'techdocs:' charts/backstage/values.yaml shows builder and publisher.type: awsS3
helm lint charts/backstage/ exits 0 after plugin config additions
stories.testPlan: grep -A5 'catalog:' charts/backstage/values.yaml; grep -A5 'kubernetes:' charts/backstage/values.yaml; grep -A5 'argocd:' charts/backstage/values.yaml; grep -A5 'techdocs:' charts/backstage/values.yaml; helm lint charts/backstage/; helm template charts/backstage/ | grep catalog

stories.title: Helm charts: SonarQube and ReportPortal
stories.description: Create charts/sonarqube/ wrapping sonarqube/sonarqube. PostgreSQL storage via Crossplane. Keycloak OIDC. Ingress at sonar.{{ .Values.global.domain }}. GitLab CI integration documented. Create charts/reportportal/ using reportportal Helm chart. PostgreSQL + Elasticsearch + RabbitMQ dependencies. Keycloak OIDC. Ingress at reports.{{ .Values.global.domain }}. Both in argocd-apps/devex/.
acceptanceCriteria: charts/sonarqube/ with Keycloak OIDC and ceph-block storage
charts/reportportal/ with all dependencies and Keycloak OIDC
GitLab CI integration guide in docs/
stories.testPlan: grep 'sonarqube' vendor/VENDORS.yaml | grep ha_exception; grep -n 'replicaCount' charts/sonarqube/values.yaml; helm lint charts/sonarqube/ charts/reportportal/; helm template charts/sonarqube/ | grep PodDisruptionBudget; helm template charts/reportportal/ | grep PodDisruptionBudget.
reviewNotes: [Review 1] HA gate AC failed: 'Default replicaCount in values.yaml is >= 2' (CLAUDE.md quality gate #12). Command: grep -n 'replicaCount' charts/sonarqube/values.yaml — Output: '33: replicaCount: 1' (nested under sonarqube: subchart key). helm template charts/sonarqube/ | grep 'replicas:' — Output: 'replicas: 1' (SonarQube pod). SonarQube Community Edition supports only 1 replica. Fix: add ha_exception: true entry in vendor/VENDORS.yaml for sonarqube with ha_exception_reason, AND add top-level replicaCount: 1 with a comment referencing the VENDORS.yaml entry. reportportal chart: replicaCount: 2 — PASS. All other ACs pass.

smart.notes: Specific 4: the ha_exception fix from reviewNotes is precise, but 'GitLab CI integration guide in docs/' specifies neither a filename nor a content outline. Measurable 4: ACs like 'charts/sonarqube/ with Keycloak OIDC and ceph-block storage' are descriptions rather than runnable commands — testPlan is more rigorous than the ACs. Achievable 3: two charts (ReportPortal pulls in PostgreSQL + Elasticsearch + RabbitMQ subchart dependencies) plus a docs file is at the ceiling of a 3-point story. TimeBound 4: 'GitLab CI integration guide in docs/' scope is open-ended without a content checklist.

stories.returnedReason: SonarQube CE is single-instance; ha_exception entry must be added to vendor/VENDORS.yaml and replicaCount: 1 documented at chart top-level before HA gate #12 will pass.
stories.readinessNote: Re-opened with specific fix: (1) add ha_exception: true with ha_exception_reason to vendor/VENDORS.yaml for sonarqube; (2) add top-level replicaCount: 1 with a comment referencing the VENDORS.yaml exception to charts/sonarqube/values.yaml. testPlan updated to verify these specifically.
